hero.title: AI for Mechanic
hero.description: Your virtual assistant modernizes auto care by managing service appointments, recording repair notes, sending maintenance reminders, and scheduling follow-ups.

stats.label: Fewer missed service appointments with automated reminders.
Reduced hours spent on scheduling and logging repairs.
Higher customer retention with consistent service tracking and tailored care.

blocks.heading: A Smarter Way to Run Your Workshop
blocks.description: At VirtualAssistant.com.au, we know that no two automotive businesses are the same. Whether you're a one-man show working from your garage at home, a small local workshop, or a larger automotive service center, our AI Virtual Receptionist adapts perfectly to your setup. It handles customer calls, service bookings, and general inquiries automatically — keeping your day organized and ensuring no job or lead is missed.

blocks.heading: Focus on Repairs, Not the Phone
blocks.description: Your AI Receptionist answers calls and manages bookings while you're under the hood. It can respond to questions like 'Can I book a car service?', 'Do you do RWC checks?', or 'How long will my car be off the road?' instantly and accurately. It can also reschedule jobs, send reminders, and notify customers when their car is ready — so you can stay focused on what you do best: fixing cars.

blocks.heading: Never Miss a Customer or Booking Again
blocks.description: Even during busy periods or after hours, your AI Receptionist ensures no call or message goes unanswered. It provides information about your services — from logbook servicing and brake repairs to diagnostics and tyre replacements — and books jobs straight into your calendar. Whether you're working alone or managing a full team, it helps you stay connected and efficient 24/7.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Mechanics Choose VirtualAssistant.com.au
whyChooseUs.description: Our AI Virtual Receptionist is trusted by mechanics across Australia — from independent home garages to major automotive workshops. It integrates seamlessly with your booking and management systems, ensuring smooth communication with customers and suppliers alike. Best of all, your AI Receptionist can be trained specifically to your workshop's tone, services, and workflow — scaling with you as your business grows. Let our AI manage your calls and admin so you can focus on getting cars back on the road and keeping customers satisfied.

card.heading: Simplify Customer Notes and Follow-Ups
card.description: After each job, you can record a quick voice memo that's automatically transcribed and summarized — perfect for noting work completed or parts needed for future reference. Upload job cards, invoices, or inspection reports directly into your dashboard, keeping every detail organized and accessible.
